scripts.build: bun run --filter './packages/regex-wand' build && bun run --filter './apps/playground' build
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run --filter './packages/regex-wand' check && bun run --filter './apps/playground' check
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter './packages/regex-wand' typecheck && bun run --filter './apps/playground' typecheck
